_comment: CATALOGUE manifest (per-app record). The file actually polled by case-service is official/sources.json (the seeded official source URL); _poll_source() reads it and ingests packages into marketplace_packages. Keep this entry in sync with official/sources.json. Tier is NOT trusted from here — it is re-derived by _effective_tier: official requires source org velaris-app-os AND id in official_registry.json.
name: HxTest
description: AI test layer for Velaris: scenario generation (HxNexus), live regeneration, rationale, the Studio HxTest page, and app-bundled test registration. Built on the inbuilt Test Suite. Installing it turns on /api/v1/hxtest and the Studio HxTest module for the tenant.

versions.release_notes: Initial release. Marketplace AI layer on top of the inbuilt Test Suite.
